title: PROP-FEED-S4-016 missing TS-side parserParity vitest snapshot test
description: verification-architecture.md §13 Sprint 4 Tooling Map (line 278) and §13 PROP-FEED-S4-016 (line 640) explicitly require BOTH a Rust snapshot test AND a vitest snapshot test for parser parity: 'Rust: promptnotes/src-tauri/tests/feed_handlers.rs (...); TS: promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/parserParity.test.ts (新規) | Rust snapshot test + vitest snapshot test'. The Rust side test exists (prop_s4_016_parse_markdown_to_blocks_basic_cases at feed_handlers.rs:628-669), but it asserts only on the Rust output's structural shape — it never compares against the TS output. The TS-side parserParity.test.ts file does not exist in the repository. PROP-FEED-S4-016 is marked Required: true in §13 (line 640) and is explicitly identified as the Sprint 4 gating proof obligation: 'Sprint 4 ゲートでは基本ケーススナップショット 1 ペアの PASS をもって Phase 5 gate を満たすとする.' Without the TS-side snapshot, the cross-language parity claim is unverified — Rust and TS could diverge silently (e.g., id naming scheme, content trimming, list item detection) and this gate would not catch it.
evidence:
$ ls promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/parserParity.test.ts
No such file or directory.

verification-architecture.md:278: 'PROP-FEED-S4-016 | Rust: promptnotes/src-tauri/tests/feed_handlers.rs (...); TS: promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/parserParity.test.ts (新規) | Rust snapshot test + vitest snapshot test'

feed_handlers.rs:627-669 prop_s4_016_parse_markdown_to_blocks_basic_cases — only checks Rust output, no parity with TS.
remediation: Create promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/parserParity.test.ts with at minimum the basic case from spec line 759: parseMarkdownToBlocks('# heading\\n\\nparagraph') and snapshot the resulting (type, content) tuples. Then add a corresponding Rust test that snapshots the same fixture's output (id-stripped) and assert that the structural payload matches. Without this paired snapshot, PROP-FEED-S4-016 (Required: true) cannot be claimed as proved.
